steps: Pre-session: set 90-min timer, define quit rules, silence notifications
UTG opens, MP 3-bets; you fold marginal suited hand per plan
Timer ends; you quit on time and log results
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Mental Game Demo 001 Module.
reaction_text: High-voltage line! Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.

steps: BTN bluffs river vs BB and gets called
You tag the hand, breathe-reset 10 seconds, stand up for water
Return and follow checklist: reduce tables and focus on next spot
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Mental Game Demo 002 Module.
reaction_text: Strong punch there! Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.

steps: CO faces toxic chat and rising heart rate
Mute chat, table-change to softer lineup
Decision quality improves as distractions drop
lesson_goal: Goal: Core Mental Game Demo 003 Module.
reaction_text: Great flow. Keep pressing on l2 core rules check.
